scripts.edge:receipt: python3 scripts/edge_truth_receipt.py --repo-root .. --surface-id chetana-public-edge --product Chetana --domain chetana.activemirror.ai --origin https://chetana.activemirror.ai --kind fastapi_spa --builder vite_and_fastapi --served-path /version.json --served-path /.well-known/edge-truth.json --watch-path backend/app/main.py --watch-path frontend/index.html --watch-path frontend/package.json --watch-path frontend/public --watch-path frontend/src --exclude-name version.json --exclude-name edge-truth.json --output frontend/public/version.json --output frontend/public/.well-known/edge-truth.json --note "Frontend assets are served by the FastAPI edge."
scripts.build: npm run edge:receipt && tsc -b && vite build
